title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS gives AI coding agents up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures for working with AWS services. It includes agent skills as Markdown runbooks, plugins, and MCP configuration, enabling rapid deployment of Lambda functions and other AWS infrastructure from natural language prompts.
